news.headline: Compare staking yields in PoS blockchains like Cosmos, Polkadot, & Ethereum. CoinGecko shows varying rates. Check it out!
news.summary: Discover the different staking yields and ratios on leading Proof-of-Stake blockchains like Cosmos, Polkadot, and Ethereum. CoinGecko's analysis delves into these numbers for further insight. Find out more about this at the provided link.

news.headline: NVIDIA teams up with top Indian IT firms (Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Wipro) to boost AI adoption, generating jobs and training devs in India.
news.summary: In a strategic move, NVIDIA has partnered with leading Indian tech giants Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, and Wipro to boost the implementation of AI in India. This collaboration aims to drive AI adoption in the country, creating numerous job opportunities and offering specialized training programs for developers gearing up for the AI revolution. By joining forces with these key players, NVIDIA is set to significantly impact the AI landscape in India, leveraging the expertise and resources of these established firms to propel the growth and innovation of AI technology.

news.headline: Nobel economist Daron Acemoglu endorses Kamala Harris for presidency with 22 others, praising her economic policies.
news.summary: Nobel Prize-winning economist Daron Acemoglu, along with 22 other Nobel laureates, formally endorsed Kamala Harris for the U.S. presidency. The endorsement was made public on Thursday, underscoring their confidence in Harris’s economic strategies. Acemoglu announced this development on X, stressing the unified backing for Harris’s economic proposals. More than half of the living U.S. Nobel Prize laureates in economics have signed a letter praising Harris’s economic agenda, labeling it as far superior to that of former President Donald Trump. They believe Harris’s policies will drive robust and fair economic growth, benefiting aspects such as health, investment, and sustainability. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Harris and Trump strive to influence undecided voters.
Sunwoda Energy makes it to BNEF Energy Storage Tier 1 List for Q4 2024, enhancing global recognition.
news.summary: Sunwoda Energy, a leading provider of energy storage solutions based in Shenzhen, China, recently announced its selection for the prestigious Bloomberg New Energy Finance (BNEF) Energy Storage Tier 1 List for the fourth quarter of 2024. This marks the fourth consecutive quarter that Sunwoda Energy has achieved this recognition. The BNEF Tier 1 list is highly regarded worldwide for highlighting the top companies in the energy storage sector. Sunwoda's consistent presence on this list underscores its strong position in the industry.

news.headline: 2024 Zhangjiajie International Tourism Innovation Week hosted by SMART from Oct 18-20 shows China's tourism industry vitality.
news.summary: In Zhangjiajie, Hunan Province, the 2024 Zhangjiajie International Tourism Innovation Week took place from October 18th to 20th. The event, organized by SMART, focused on the theme of 'Integration and Expanding Frontiers'. This tourism innovation week saw participation from various stakeholders aiming to promote collaboration and synergy for the tourism sector. The event attracted a significant number of attendees and presented opportunities for networking and exploring new avenues in the tourism industry.

news.headline: Hexaware Technologies Limited opens third office in Germany on Sep 19, 2024. Inauguration ceremony led by Adam Medros and Tobias Plaputta.
news.summary: On September 19, 2024, Hexaware Technologies Limited inaugurated its third office in Germany, located in Iselin, New Jersey. The event was led by Adam Medros, CEO of Spark Networks, and Tobias Plaputta, CTO of Spark Networks, along with Sanjay Salunkhe. The expansion signifies a significant milestone for Hexaware, marking its continued growth and presence in the European market. This move adds to the company's global presence and further solidifies its position as a key player in the technology industry.

Global AgriTech market size projected to grow steadily from 2024-2029, segmented by types and applications. (Including specific technologies)
news.summary: In Dublin on October 24, 2024, it was reported that the worldwide AgriTech market is categorized into different segments: Big Data and Analytics, Biotechnology and Biochemical, Mobility, Sensors and Connected Devices, among others. The market is further divided by application into Crop Production, Livestock Farming, Aquaculture, and Forestry Management.

news.headline: Swiss agency invests $3M in LatticeFlow AI to develop AI governance platform, selected from 373 applicants.
news.summary: LatticeFlow AI, a top Swiss company in reliable AI technology, has recently disclosed that it successfully obtained approximately USD 3M in funding from the Swiss Innovation Agency (Innosuisse). This financial support aims to propel their groundbreaking AI Assessments platform. Out of a vast pool of 373 applications, only 33 projects were chosen for the prestigious Swiss Accelerator initiative, placing LatticeFlow AI in an elite group. This substantial funding highlights the platform's exceptional innovative capabilities, its importance in the market, and the promising prospects for commercial success.

news.headline: Prospera Energy Inc. reports three years of strategic restructuring, recovery, and future growth in Calgary. TSX.V: PEI, OTC: GXRFF, FRA: OF6B.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, a company named Prospera Energy Inc. (PEI) made an announcement in Calgary, Alberta. PEI is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol PEI, on the OTC market under the ticker symbol GXRFF, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol OF6B.

news.headline: eQ Community Properties Fund secured over 400 million EUR in renewed loans, with Deutsche Bank as a new lender.
Hinen showcases safety in renewable energy with All-in-one Series RESS at All Energy Australia 2024.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia on October 24, 2024, the renewable energy sector is experiencing significant growth, emphasizing the importance of secure and efficient home energy storage solutions. At All Energy Australia 2024, Hinen is presenting its dedication to safety through the Hinen All-in-one Series RESS at booth K113. This exhibition, recognized as Australia's leading renewable energy expo, offers Hinen a platform to exhibit how its advanced safety measures are establishing new standards in domestic energy storage technology.

news.headline: MKS Instruments building new factory in Penang, Malaysia to create 1,000 jobs, enhancing the manufacturing sector.
news.summary: A new manufacturing plant is set to be established in Penang, Malaysia, with the aim of creating job opportunities for around 1,000 individuals. This initiative is expected to bring significant benefits to Malaysia's manufacturing sector by providing employment opportunities and fostering economic growth.

news.headline: Presentation of Nilörn Interim Report Q3, 2024 on 25/10 at 8:30am CET via Teams. Register to join CEO presentation.
news.summary: Join us for a virtual presentation on 25/10 at 08.30 am CET via Teams, where the CEO will discuss the report. To attend, please register using the provided link.

news.headline: Vistin Pharma ASA invites stakeholders to Q3 2024 conference call.
France’s President Macron: France is to provide 100 mln Euros in Lebanese humanitarian aid.
JinkoSolar launches Tiger Neo 3.0, world's most powerful solar panels with up to 670W capacity.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, JinkoSolar, a top PV and ESS supplier, revealed the release of its advanced Tiger Neo 3.0 solar panels utilizing Next Generation TOPCon Technology in Shanghai. These panels boast a remarkable power output of up to 670 W, making them the most potent modules globally.

news.headline: Boldyn Networks announces Private 5G as a Service for enterprises to boost digital transformation with low investment.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in London, Boldyn Networks (Boldyn) introduced Private 5G as a Service, a fresh service option designed for enterprise clients. This service provides the complete potential of Private 5G, bolstering digital transformation initiatives without the need for substantial upfront investment or ongoing maintenance hassles.

news.headline: Ethereum's upcoming upgrade, "The Verge," will allow nodes on phones and smartwatches by lowering hardware requirements.
news.summary: The upcoming upgrade for Ethereum, known as "The Verge," is set to significantly lower hardware requirements, enabling node operations on common devices such as phones and smartwatches. This advancement is expected to democratize access to node participation by allowing more people to engage with Ethereum using everyday gadgets.

news.headline: Report titled 'Be Distinctive Britain' explores Brand Britain's enduring distinctiveness. #brandbritain #London
news.summary: A recent report titled 'Be Distinctive Britain' has examined the current status of Brand Britain. The report provides a detailed analysis of the brand's standing in the market.

news.headline: Cincoze offers industrial panel PCs for HMI applications in tough environments, including indoor, outdoor, and integration-ready models.
news.summary: Cincoze, a rugged embedded computer brand based in Taipei, Taiwan, has introduced the Display Computing - CRYSTAL product line tailored for HMI applications in challenging environments. This product line consists of three series: industrial panel PCs suitable for tough indoor settings, sunlight readable panel PCs ideal for bright outdoor conditions, and open frame industrial panel PCs for easy integration with machinery. These devices offer industrial-grade rugged protection, compliance with international standards, and cutting-edge features for optimal performance.

news.headline: Pepper Advantage Ireland appoints new members to executive team, focusing on customer support; emphasizes customer-centric approach.
news.summary: Pepper Advantage Ireland, part of Pepper Advantage Group, based in Dublin, has recently added new members to its executive team. Among these appointments is the position of Chief Customer Officer, emphasizing the company's dedication to prioritizing customer needs and enhancing borrower assistance. This strategic move underscores Pepper Advantage's commitment to putting customers first and improving support levels. The organization is also focusing on enhancing its technology to stay competitive in the market.

news.headline: CPP Investments partners with Kennedy Wilson to launch UK single-family rental JV, targeting £1 billion in real estate. CPP to commit £500 million, Kennedy Wilson to commit £56 million.
news.summary: In London, Canada Pension Plan Investment Board (CPP Investments) and Kennedy Wilson (NYSE: KW) have collaborated to establish a new single-family rental housing joint venture in the United Kingdom. CPP Investments is set to invest £500 million initially, while Kennedy Wilson will contribute £56 million. The joint venture aims to reach around £1 billion in asset value, with added leverage, and both parties may allocate more funds in the future.

news.headline: Sumsub named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Identity Verification, recognized for global verification and monitoring.
news.summary: London, October 24, 2024 - Sumsub, a leading global identity verification and monitoring provider, has recently been acknowledged as a Leader in Gartner's "Magic Quadrant for Identity Verification" report. This recognition solidifies Sumsub's position as a key player in the industry. This acknowledgment comes as a result of Sumsub's expertise and innovation, showcasing their commitment to excellence.

news.headline: Seegene partners with Microsoft and Springer Nature to advance disease-free world vision, introduces AI-powered product automation and analysis at London roundtable.
news.summary: A tri-party executive roundtable recently took place in London with the goal of enhancing synergies to fulfill Seegene's mission of establishing 'a world free from diseases'. Initial findings revealed advancements in automating product development and conducting statistical analysis of syndromic test outcomes, utilizing Microsoft's AI technology.

news.headline: Spain's Digital Nomad Visa offers global remote workers a chance to live and work in the country with varying requirements. Introduced recently, it is gaining popularity among international professionals.
news.summary: An appealing opportunity for international professionals has emerged with the introduction of the Digital Nomad Visa, allowing them to reside and work remotely in Spain. The visa's criteria differ depending on bilateral agreements in place, as highlighted by the international law firm Klev&Vera. Interested individuals should consider these requirements to ensure compliance. The visa offers a promising prospect for professionals seeking to work from Spain.

news.headline: AKVA Group ASA invites for Q3 2024 financial results presentation.
news.summary: AKVA group ASA is pleased to announce the upcoming presentation of its financial results for the third quarter of 2024. Investors and stakeholders are invited to attend the presentation on the specified date.

Bitcoin needs to maintain the 2021 level to avoid further decline after hitting a ten-day low and rebounding. Bulls eye two crucial price points.
news.summary: After reaching a ten-day low, Bitcoin has seen a rebound in its price. Currently, there are two specific price points for Bitcoin that are pivotal for bullish investors. This signifies a potential turning point in the market's sentiment towards the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Is Cambridge becoming UK's Silicon Valley?.
Orexo Q3 2024: Net revenues SEK 136.5m, EBITDA SEK -0.7m, Net earnings SEK -41.9m, Cash SEK 114.9m, EPS SEK -1.21.
news.summary: In Q3 2024, Orexo AB reported total net revenues of SEK 136.5 million, down from SEK 156.1 million in the same period last year. The EBITDA was SEK -0.7 million compared to SEK -9.5 million previously, and net earnings were SEK -41.9 million compared to SEK -33.3 million. The US Commercial segment saw net revenues of SEK 131.0 million. Cash flow from operating activities was SEK -13.4 million, with cash and cash equivalents totaling SEK 114.9 million. Earnings per share were SEK -1.21. Orexo AB's sustainability efforts were ranked in the top 5% globally by EcoVadis. The company received a letter from the FDA regarding additional data for OX124. The financial guidance for 2024 remained unchanged. Additionally, after the period, a phase 1 clinical study was initiated for OX640 for allergic rhinitis participants.

news.headline: TÜV Rheinland partners with Lenovo for 2024 supplier standards conference in China promoting green manufacturing.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on October 24, 2024, Lenovo Group partnered with TÜV Rheinland Greater China, an international third-party testing organization, for an event on October 15. The collaboration involved the "2024 Lenovo" initiative.

news.headline: Dedicare's Q3 2024 net sales at SEK 460.9 million, EBITA at SEK 11.2 million, both lower than the previous year.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, a company in Stockholm reported net sales of SEK 460.9 million, showing a decrease compared to the previous year. The EBITA was SEK 11.2 million, down significantly from SEK 40.6 million in the same period last year. After adjusting for non-recurring items, the EBITA was SEK 19.0 million, also lower than the previous period. The EBITA margin was 2.4 percent, down from 7.7 percent, and when adjusted for non-recurring items, it was 4.1 percent. The EBIT for the period was SEK 9.0 million.

news.headline: NVIDIA NIM Agent Blueprint enhances AI virtual assistants for customer service, boosting efficiency and personalization. #innovation #AI
news.summary: Discover how NVIDIA's NIM Agent Blueprint is revolutionizing AI virtual assistants in customer service, elevating performance and customization in various sectors. This advancement has resulted in a significant improvement in efficiency, accuracy, and personalization, benefiting industries worldwide. The blueprint is paving the way for a new era of customer service, with noticeable enhancements across the board.

news.headline: Binance finishes Worldcoin (WLD) mainnet integration, enabling deposits and withdrawals. A major milestone in crypto.
news.summary: Binance recently completed the integration of Worldcoin's (WLD) mainnet into its system, enabling users to conduct deposits and withdrawals. This development represents a major milestone for the cryptocurrency exchange.

news.headline: Hytera Communications introduces 2 new body camera models to enhance digital evidence acquisition, revolutionizing management.
news.summary: Recently, in Shenzhen, China, Hytera Communications introduced two new models of body cameras showcasing their latest advancements in communication solutions.

Sobi report: Q3 2024 revenue up 33%, reaching SEK 6,894M; strong pipeline momentum.
news.summary: Today, Swedish Orphan Biovitrum AB (Sobi®) released its third quarter 2024 report, revealing a significant increase in total revenue. Specifically, revenue surged by 33 percent to SEK 6,894 million, translating to a 39 percent growth at constant exchange rates (CER). Notably, Haematology revenue also experienced growth during this period.

news.headline: Eramet acquires Tsingshan's stake in Argentina lithium venture, deal with undisclosed amount.
Hexagon Composites ASA will release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, at 07:00 am CET. Presentation at 08:30 am by Chair and CFO.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, Hexagon Composites ASA is set to announce its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, at 07:00 am CET. The Chair of the Board, Knut Flakk, along with CFO David Bandele, will discuss the results at 08:30 am on the same day. This presentation is highly anticipated by shareholders and analysts, hoping for insights into the company's performance.

news.headline: Estonia and UAE enhance cooperation in digital economy and innovation; Estonian ICT Trade Mission explores joint investments.
news.summary: Delegates from the Republic of Estonia, led by government organization Trade Estonia, undertook an ICT trade mission to the UAE on October 24, 2024. This mission aimed to strengthen bilateral relations and explore joint investment opportunities between the two countries. The Estonian delegation engaged with key stakeholders in Dubai, focusing on enhancing cooperation in the ICT sector. This initiative underscored Estonia's commitment to expanding its global partnerships.

news.headline: Traders favour a half-point ECB interest-rate cut in December.
